_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: CanvasMC
author: ptero@redbananaofficial.com
description: Supercharge your Minecraft server with multithreaded dimension ticking, improved chunk generation, optimized entity handling and many more powerful optimizations.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
cd /mnt/server

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq openjdk-17-jdk

# Clean old install
rm -f server.jar

MC_VERSION="$(echo "$MC_VERSION" | tr -d ' ')"
CANVAS_BUILD="$(echo "$CANVAS_BUILD" | tr -d ' ')"

# Get version/build
if [[ "$CANVAS_BUILD" == "latest" ]]; then
    if [[ "$MC_VERSION" == "latest" ]]; then
        echo "[CanvasMC] Fetching latest Minecraft version and build..."
        BUILD_INFO=$(curl -fsSL "https://canvasmc.io/api/v2/builds/latest?project=canvas")
    else
        echo "[CanvasMC] Fetching latest build for Minecraft $MC_VERSION..."
        BUILD_INFO=$(curl -fsSL "https://canvasmc.io/api/v2/builds/latest?project=canvas&channel=$MC_VERSION")
    fi

    if [[ -z "$BUILD_INFO" ]]; then
        echo "[CanvasMC] Failed to query Canvas API."
        exit 1
    fi

    RESULT=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.result')
    if [[ "$RESULT" != "SUCCESS" ]]; then
        echo "[CanvasMC] Canvas API returned an error."
        echo "$BUILD_INFO"
        exit 1
    fi

    MC_VERSION=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.channelVersion')
    BUILD_NUMBER=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.buildNumber')
    JAR_URL=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.downloadUrl')

else
    # Specified build number
    BUILD_NUMBER="$CANVAS_BUILD"

    if [[ "$MC_VERSION" == "latest" ]]; then
        echo "[CanvasMC] Fetching latest Minecraft version..."
        BUILD_INFO=$(curl -fsSL "https://canvasmc.io/api/v2/builds/latest?project=canvas")

        if [[ -z "$BUILD_INFO" ]]; then
            echo "[CanvasMC] Failed to query Canvas API."
            exit 1
        fi

        RESULT=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.result')
        if [[ "$RESULT" != "SUCCESS" ]]; then
            echo "[CanvasMC] Canvas API returned an error."
            echo "$BUILD_INFO"
            exit 1
        fi

        MC_VERSION=$(echo "$BUILD_INFO" | jq -r '.channelVersion')
    fi

    JAR_URL="https://jenkins.canvasmc.io/job/Canvas/${BUILD_NUMBER}/artifact/canvas-server/build/libs/canvas-build.${BUILD_NUMBER}.jar"
fi

# Check values
if [[ -z "$MC_VERSION" || "$MC_VERSION" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "[CanvasMC] Failed to resolve a valid Minecraft version."
    exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "$BUILD_NUMBER" || "$BUILD_NUMBER" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "[CanvasMC] Failed to resolve a valid build number."
    exit 1
fi

if [[ -z "$JAR_URL" || "$JAR_URL" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "[CanvasMC] Failed to resolve a valid download URL."
    exit 1
fi

echo "[CanvasMC] Using Minecraft version: $MC_VERSION"
echo "[CanvasMC] Using build number: $BUILD_NUMBER"

echo "[CanvasMC] Downloading server.jar from:"
echo "$JAR_URL"

curl -fsSL -o server.jar "$JAR_URL"

if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then
    echo "[CanvasMC] Download failed."
    exit 1
fi

if [[ ! -f server.jar || ! -s server.jar ]]; then
    echo "[CanvasMC] Downloaded server.jar is invalid."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Installation complete."

variables.name: Canvas MC Version
variables.description: CanvasMC-Minecraft version (example: 1.21.4). Set to 'latest' to use latest version

variables.name: CanvasMC Build Number
variables.description: Build number from https://jenkins.canvasmc.io/job/Canvas/. Set to 'latest' to get the newest build
